subcodes.first_line: O disciple of the true Teacher! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God that thou art with the wondrous brethren, 'Inayat and Baba [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تلمیذ معلم حقیقی نامه شما رسید حمد خدا را که با اخوان بدیع و عنایت و بابا
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @praise and encouragement
